title: Define Rectangular Named Areas across Breakpoints
summary: Build and verify grid areas in field manual header navigation content and evidence composition through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain grid areas from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply grid areas without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

content.text: Grid-template-areas provides a readable map when each named area forms one filled rectangle. A period creates an empty cell. Items opt into areas with grid-area. Responsive templates may redefine the area map, but content priority and DOM order must remain valid in every version. Area names should describe structural roles rather than coordinates or temporary colors. Apply it to field manual header navigation content and evidence composition.
